content.text:
All 5 active tests pass (3 remain as todo). The vertical blinker test passes with the existing full algorithm implementation.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No new code needed - the full algorithm in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_12-36-55_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts` already correctly handles oscillation. The neighbor-counting logic combined with B3/S23 rules naturally produces the horizontal blinker `[[-1,1], [0,1], [1,1]]` from the vertical blinker `[[0,0], [0,1], [0,2]]`.
- Result: All tests pass (5 passing, 3 todo)
- Approach: This is the minimal state - the existing implementation was already general enough to satisfy this test. No changes were required to make the test green.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
